lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Hello adventurer, do you seek a quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am always looking for a quest.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Well, I see poor Romeo wandering around the square. I think he may need help.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: I was helping him and Juliet to meet, but it became impossible.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: I am sure he can use some help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I prefer just to kill things.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: That's a fine career in these lands. There is more that needs killing every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you recommend a good bar?

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Drinking will be the death of you.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: But the Blue Moon in the city is cheap enough.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: And providing you buy one drink an hour they let you stay all night.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Oh to be a father in the times of whiskey.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: I sing and I drink and I wake up in gutters.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Top of the morning to you.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: To err is human, to forgive, quite difficult.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: I need a think I drink.

sections.title: Delivering a letter from the Wise Old Man

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Wise Old Man of Draynor Village sent you this message about your drinking habits!

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: mssge? wha messsge?

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: oh, msesesge for me.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: in nomine saradomini, blah blah blah...

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: Whee! Mmmgic power, kazamm...

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: here, hve som munny.

lines.speaker: Father Lawrence
lines.text: here, hve som munny.
